history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a notification-like interface with an Arabic-worded header and a blue message box, plus a time indicator at the top left.

The main subject is a user interface screen with a dark header bar, a small status area on the top right, and a large blue rounded rectangle containing a warning message in Indonesian.

The setting appears to be an electronic device display, indoors or not is unclear, and the time of day is not clearly determinable beyond the on-screen time. The screen shows a simple layout with text and icons on a flat background.

Visual details include a black top bar with white icons and text, including a left-pointing arrow on the left and a trash can icon on the right. On the top left, the time reads “20:39” followed by an ellipsis. Centered near the upper portion is the line “Item yang baru-baru ini dihapus” with a second line beneath it reading “16,74GB.” Below that, there is a large blue rounded rectangle with white Indonesian text spanning multiple lines. The background outside the blue box is white, and the overall composition is vertically stacked with the message box occupying the central area.

Visible text:
20:39 ...
Item yang baru-baru ini dihapus
16,74GB
Item terhapus yang telah dicadangkan dapat tetap berada di cloud hingga 60 hari. Item yang belum dicadangkan akan disimpan hingga 30 hari.

Practical Summary:
The image is a device screenshot showing a storage or deleted-items notice. It explains that deleted items that have been backed up may remain in the cloud for a certain number of days, while items not backed up are kept for a shorter period.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
